news.t: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Unveils New JPMorgan 100% U.S. Treasury Securities Money Market ETF (JMMF)

overview.description: The JPMorgan 100% U.S. Treasury Securities Money Market ETF (JMMF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in debt securities of the US Treasury with remaining maturities of 397 days or less. JMMF was launched on Dec 10, 2025 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Unveils New JPMorgan 100% U.S. Treasury Securities Money Market ETF (JMMF)
data.text: Fund marks the firm's entry into the rapidly evolving money market ETF space NEW YORK , Dec. 11, 2025 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the launch of the JPMorgan 100% U.S. ...
